feedback.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. The explanation as to how consumer legislation should be is important for consumer protection, namely to act on the type of hidden information, to understand how to identify, the acceptance of cookies, which is not good, to understand what is essential, many thanks to it, it is a good project and a good deal for the average true consumer, not the one reflected in the rules of the European Union, genial!
